sqlMap.select: select * from DocumentArchive where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into DocumentArchive(VersionSequence, PolicyKey DocTitle Comment DocFileName LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #DocTitle# #Comment# #DocFileName# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('DocumentArchive') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select DocumentID, DocTitle, Comment, DocFileName, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from DocumentArchive where DocumentID = #DocumentID# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update DocumentArchive set
DocTitle = #DocTitle# DocTitle = null Comment = #Comment# Comment = null DocFileName = #DocFileName# DocFileName = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where DocumentID = #DocumentID# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from DocumentArchive where DocumentID = #DocumentID# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from DocumentArchive where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select DocumentID, DocTitle, Comment, DocFileName, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from DocumentArchive where DocumentID = #DocumentID# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select DocumentID, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, DocTitle, Comment, DocFileName, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from DocumentArchive where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
